item.title: Version 1.1.2
item.description:
ParkShelf 1.1.2

  • Fixes drag-to-park not working for some users. Dragging a window onto the shelf needs macOS “Input Monitoring” permission, which is separate from Accessibility. ParkShelf now asks for it during setup, clearly flags when it’s missing, and starts working the moment you grant it — no relaunch needed.
  • If drag-to-park was silent for you before, open the ParkShelf menu-bar icon for a one-tap fix, or enable Input Monitoring in System Settings → Privacy & Security. Keyboard shortcuts were unaffected either way.
